query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=collection and (CollectorCreated OR CollectorUpdated OR CollectorDeleted OR CollectorUpgradeCompleted)
| timeslice by 1h
| json "eventName" as EventName nodrop
| where EventName in ("CollectorCreated", "CollectorUpdated", "CollectorDeleted", "CollectorUpgradeCompleted") 
| count as Count by EventName,_timeslice
//| fillmissing values() in EventName 
| fillmissing timeslice(1h)
| transpose row _timeslice column eventname
